changelog:
VIUMO v1.1.0 • The Milestone Release! 🎉

Our core features are fully complete! This official update delivers a finalized, seamless streaming experience.

What's New:
• Fully completed categories: Hollywood, Nollywood, Trending, and Latest.
• System-wide performance & stability optimizations.

⚠️ Note: Updating from v1.0.7 or earlier will clear older downloaded videos due to system upgrades. Users on v1.0.8/1.0.9 are unaffected.
